description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10-stretch Docker image, caching node_modules, and a global before_script that runs npm install. Define stages test and deployment. Add a lint job in the test stage that runs CI=true npm run lint. Add a test_app job in the test stage that runs CI=true npm test. Add a deploy job in the deployment stage that only runs on the master branch and executes apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby ruby-dev rubygems-integration, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=test-app-bh --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY to deploy to Heroku.
